# Radiantilyk Aesthetic

> Medspa in San Jose, California offering injectables, lasers, facials, body contouring, and medical wellness (GLP-1, HRT, peptides). Online booking, transparent pricing, and a 48-hour cancellation policy.

Location:
- San Jose — 2100 Curtner Ave, Ste 1B, San Jose, CA 95124

All Medical Wellness services (GLP-1, HRT, Peptides) are provided by Kiem. No booking deposit is collected; a card on file is only charged for completed services or no-shows.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Radiantilyk Aesthetic, location, and what we do.
- [Services & Pricing](/services): Full menu with prices, descriptions, and concern filters.
- [Book an appointment](/book): Online booking with provider, date, and time.
- [FAQ](/faq): Pricing, financing, pain, downtime, and cancellation policy.
- [Journal](/journal): Treatment guides and educational articles.
- [San Jose location](/san-jose): Address, parking, providers, and services.
- [Quiz](/quiz): Treatment-finder quiz based on your concerns.
- [Waitlist](/waitlist): Join the waitlist when preferred times are full.
